creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, on the frontpage, there is a link "Get FreeBSD now", which is quite obvious ;-) 
it links to: http://www.freebsd.org/where.html which should provide the information 
needed. Please do note that this is not a PR, but a user question, if you still have 
problems finding the proper things, please ask around on the questions@ mailinglist. 

--remko
